step_rationale: Monounsaturated fatty acid and acylcarnitine marker; ischemia-associated metabolite in ACS.
mechanism: Monounsaturated fatty acid elevated in ACS, reflecting ischemia-associated acylcarnitine dysmetabolism.

references.title: Metabolomics Analysis Identifies Differential Metabolites as Biomarkers for Acute Myocardial Infarction.
GC-MS validation and analysis of targeted plasma metabolites related to carbonyl stress in type 2 diabetes mellitus patients with and without acute coronary syndrome.
Pilot study of myocardial ischemia-induced metabolomic changes in emergency department patients undergoing stress testing.
